Created attachment 242588
patch to update to 0.15.80533

Update to jotta-cli to 0.15.80533, there appears to be no other user visible changes for the Windows version, but this at least keeps things up to date.

Changelog is at: https://docs.jottacloud.com/en/articles/1461561-release-notes-for-jottacloud-cli
